description: Sample for 3D-extended L-system in creature generation. Use as template: Input metrics from sigil, output expanded string and interpreted 3D vertices/edges for mesh/display. Extends 2D with ^/& for pitch, /\ for roll.
logic_applied: ImprintKey = SHA256(metrics); RNG seeded; Parameters chosen deterministically (more rules for 3D if D > 2.0); L-system expanded via iterative replacement; Interpreted to 3D vertices/edges via turtle (F=forward, +=yaw left, -=yaw right, ^=pitch up, &=pitch down, /=roll left, \=roll right, [=branch push, ]=pop).
expanded_string_truncated: F[^F]&[&F]F[+F][-F]^F[^F[^F]&[&F]F[+F][-F]^F]&[&F[^F]&[&F]F[+F][-F]^F]F[+F[+F][-F]^F[+F[+F][-F]^F]][-F[+F][-F]^F[-F[+F][-F]^F]]^F ... (full expansion would be longer; truncate for sample)

interpreted_3d_mesh_example.notes: Example simplified 3D vertices (x,y,z) and edges after turtle interpretation starting at (0,0,0), facing +x. Use for mesh: Connect edges with tubes (thickness from S_symmetry), render in Unity Mesh or Unreal ProceduralMesh. Scale/center bounding box for display.

integration_notes: For creatures: If D_fractal_dim > 2.5, add z-depth via ^/&; tie to gifts (e.g., 'FractalCarapace' for 3D hull). Output to 3D procedural asset.
